basic_details.short_information: Ministry of External Affairs (MEA) Consultant Notification 2026 has been released on 20 May 2026 on the official website of the Ministry of External Affairs. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the MEA Consultant Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 55 years Maximum Age: 63 years

qualification.details: Doctoral/Master’s degree in Law or other suitable qualification. Good communication skills. Good skills in English speaking and writing. Good knowledge in computers for preparing documents, presentations, datasheets etc.

selection_process: Application Review Shortlisting Interview / Written Test
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for MEA Consultant Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 10-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the MEA Consultant (Legal) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to receive applications for the MEA Consultant (Legal) recruitment is 10th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum and maximum age limit for the Consultant (Legal) post?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit for the Consultant (Legal) post is 55 years, and the maximum age limit is 63 years. Please refer to the official notification for any age relaxation details.

faq.question: Q3. What are the educational qualifications required for the Consultant (Legal) position?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Doctoral/Master’s degree in Law or an equivalent suitable qualification. Additionally, good communication and computer skills are essential.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Consultant (Legal) post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Consultant (Legal) post in the Ministry of External Affairs.

faq.question: Q5. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and send it via post.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for the MEA Consultant (Legal) recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Consultant (Legal) role?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves an application review, followed by shortlisting, and then an interview or written test.

faq.question: Q8. What type of job is this recruitment for?
faq.answer: This recruitment is for a contractual position at the Ministry of External Affairs.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the Ministry of External Affairs located for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The Ministry of External Affairs is located in New Delhi, Delhi, with a pincode of 110011.

faq.question: Q10. What are the key skills required for the Consultant (Legal) post besides the degree?
faq.answer: Besides the legal degree, good communication skills in English (speaking and writing) and proficiency in computer operations for document preparation are crucial.
